headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Quanta Services (PWR) After A 117% One Year Surge?
summary: Wondering whether Quanta Services at around US$624.84 is offering fair value or asking too much? This article walks through the key numbers so you can judge the price with more confidence. The stock has posted returns of 3.8% over the last 7 days, 9.0% over 30 days, 42.1% year to date, 117.7% over 1 year and a very large gain over 5 years, which naturally raises questions about what is already priced in. Recent coverage has focused on Quanta Services as a major player in capital goods and...
